name: top_channels
description: Channels ranked by total view count
query: SELECT uploader, SUM(CAST(val AS INT64)) AS total_views FROM `creator-d4m-2026-1774038056.insight_metadata.tokens` WHERE col = 'views' GROUP BY uploader ORDER BY total_views DESC LIMIT 50

name: high_engagement
query: SELECT video_id, SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(CASE WHEN col IN ('likes','comments') THEN CAST(val AS INT64) ELSE 0 END), NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN col = 'views' THEN CAST(val AS INT64) ELSE 0 END), 0)) AS engagement FROM `creator-d4m-2026-1774038056.insight_metadata.tokens` GROUP BY video_id HAVING engagement >= 0.05 ORDER BY engagement DESC LIMIT 100

name: recent_ontology_nodes
description: Most frequent ontology nodes across all videos
query: SELECT col, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM `creator-d4m-2026-1774038056.insight_metadata.ontology` WHERE col LIKE 'node|%|type' GROUP BY col ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 100
